chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 92 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 27.02.2024 Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Case history shows that on most of the dates, learned Counsel for applicant has remained absent. Today also, he has not appeared and no intimation is sent. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
